title: d3adgh0st-mp
description:
This modpacks aims to make your minecraft experience better.
It will give you more fps, and it makes the gameplay easier and more fun.
body:
# da3dgh0st modpack [fabric]
This is my first modpack.
Made by d3adgh0st (what a surprise)

## What does this modpack add
This modpacks aim to add performance and gameplay to your world.
I made this modpack because I like to make it easier for everyone to play minecraft and enjoy it at its best.

## Update
This modpack will update time to time.
I will add support for the newer versions

## Why did I make this
I originally made this modpack for my friends, when they installed Modrinth they could easily get the mods they wanted.
